task: Fix MCP fetch server startup error
error: npm error 404 Not Found - GET https://registry.npmjs.org/@modelcontextprotocol%2fserver-fetch - Not found
resolution: Changed the fetch server configuration in src/plugins/mcp/mcp_config.json to use the Python PyPI package `mcp-server-fetch` executed via `uvx`, instead of the incorrect `npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-fetch` which does not exist on the NPM registry.
non_obvious_patterns: The MCP 'fetch' server is implemented natively in Python and published to PyPI as `mcp-server-fetch`, while most other official MCP servers are written in TypeScript and published to the NPM registry under `@modelcontextprotocol/server-*`.
skill_correction: Remember that the MCP fetch server runs via Python/uvx. The package name is `mcp-server-fetch` on PyPI, and not `@modelcontextprotocol/server-fetch`.
